observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with surface abrasion
Visual pattern suggesting scratch on coating
Localized deviation from normal pill appearance
mechanism_explanation: Friction against a harder surface removes material, creating visible marks.
severity_visual_description: minor scratch on coating visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Add protective padding and reduce surface contact speed.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the scratch on coating would be absent and surface appears normal.
